description: Create a content slide titled 'JPMF: Sources of liquidity' with a five-step horizontal process across the top and a two-column layout below featuring a liquidity management sidebar and supporting bullet points.

items.text: Liquidity managed primarily through Money Market Funds and other liquid investments
Repurchases subject to the sole discretion of the Board
items.sub: No more than 5% of the Fund’s net assets on a quarterly basis; Board has ability to not approve a tender process

items.text: PEG has implemented Management Policies and Procedures which are overseen by the independent Board of Trustees and the JPMorgan Asset Management’s Risk Team

footer.source: 1 The JPMAM Risk Team operates independently of the JPMorgan Private Equity Group.
